findings.evidence: `mathlib/Mathlib/Order/Circular.lean:52-53` lists `Set.cIcc` and `Set.cIoo`; `mathlib/Mathlib/Order/Circular.lean:305-314` defines `def cIoo` and `theorem mem_cIoo`. Finset interval endpoints use the same style: `mathlib/Mathlib/Order/Interval/Finset/Basic.lean:139` has `left_notMem_Ioo`.
findings.fix: Rename this definition and its lemmas to use the `cIoo`/`Ioo` interval convention, e.g. `Grid.cIoo`, `mem_cIoo`, `cIoo_self`, `left_notMem_cIoo`, and `right_notMem_cIoo`.
findings.issue: `Grid.cyclicOpen` names an open circular interval with nonstandard terminology; Mathlib’s API calls the corresponding open-open circular interval `Set.cIoo`, with membership theorem `mem_cIoo`.

summary: One introduced interval name does not follow Mathlib’s circular-interval terminology, which will make the new grid API harder to find and align with existing interval lemmas.
